item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Retainer's Journey II
item.description:
A detailed record of one retainer's path to becoming a desperately sought-after servitor─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Hand over to instantly raise the level of a retainer up to a maximum of 70. (Retainer level cannot exceed current character level in the relevant class/job.)
